---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Deployik
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case or pain point that
prompted this request?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, links, or screenshots about the feature request
here.
